user_story: As an Employee, I want to view a list of my certifications with name, mandatory flag, status, completion date and valid-till, so that I can track my certification progress
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Certifications screen; When the page loads; Then I see my certifications listed with columns Certification name, Is certification mandatory, Status, Completion date and Valid till

user_story: As an Employee, I want to identify which of my certifications are mandatory, so that I can prioritize completing required ones
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Certifications screen; When I review the list; Then each certification shows whether it is mandatory

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see the validity and completion dates of each certification, so that I know when a certification expires and needs renewal
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Certifications screen; When I view a certification row; Then its Completion date and Valid till dates are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh the certifications list, so that I see the most up-to-date certification records
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Certifications screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with the latest data
